meta.name: Isha Patro
meta.title: Isha Patro
meta.description: Isha Patro — Financial Engineering graduate student at NYU, former SDE at J.P. Morgan. Quantitative research, machine learning, and software engineering.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hey, I'm Isha. I build models & systems for markets. Sometimes for the desks & teams I work with, sometimes for my own research.
about.introSub: Currently pursuing an MS in Financial Engineering at NYU Tandon, previously a Software Engineer II at J.P. Morgan working on fixed-income trading systems.

facts.label: Experience
facts.value: 4+ years shipping software & models at J.P. Morgan and Amazon.

facts.label: Off hours
facts.value: Painting, digital art, classical & tribal dance, candle making, and leading DIY builds. Former school leader & NCC cadet.

items.desc: GPA 3.6 / 4.0 · Brooklyn, NY. 2025 Numerix Women in Finance scholar, focused on quant research & ML for markets.
Epic Owner of Trade Activity Monitoring — 50% latency reduction. Architected Mortgage Matrix modernization supporting $5B+ annual volume.
Designed and implemented the Trade Reporting and Compliance Engine (TRACE), boosting data processing efficiency by 30% and streamlining regulatory reporting workflows.
JIRA bulk-ticket app, −70% handling time.
156 credits, CGPA 8.8/10. Led the university DIY club and won 1st prize twice at the Engineering Clinics Expo — for an Alexa-powered humanoid robot and an autonomous oil-spill cleanup buoy (CG0R).
Appointment Scheduler website, Chime integration.
+15% engagement, +6% revenue from analytics.
Govt. of Odisha Meritorious Student laptop award — 75%, CHSE Science.
+10% feature adoption, +18% active users.

markers.text: Graduated — D.A.V. Public School · CBSE, CGPA 9.6

items.name: Implied Prepayment Surfaces via PINNs in Agency MBS Markets
items.desc: PINN-based inverse modeling to estimate market-implied CPR from TBA prices under the Hull–White PDE — +15% incremental return in backtests.

items.name: qutePandas
items.desc: Pandas-compatible execution layer backed by kdb+/q — 10×–100×+ speedups on large analytical workloads.

items.name: DREAM-α — Robust Alpha Mining under MRM Constraints
items.desc: RL alpha-mining framework with a novel DeflatedUCB algorithm penalizing multiple-testing bias; combinatorial purged CV for regime-robust, SR 26-2 compliant portfolios.

items.name: GSHA — Multi-Modal GNN for Commodity Futures
items.desc: Graph-Spectral Hyperbolic Attention: GNNs + spectral convolution + hyperbolic attention to model financial news hierarchies for futures prediction.

items.name: Knowledge Graphs from Investopedia
items.desc: Financial knowledge graph extracted from Investopedia, integrated into Obsidian for interactive exploration.

items.name: VORTEX
items.desc: Multi-agent AI risk analytics — LangGraph, LangChain & LlamaIndex orchestrating regime-aware VaR, stress testing & market-risk interpretation.

items.name: CryptoHedgeLab
items.desc: Crypto trading & backtesting in C++ with kdb+/q — microsecond-level execution, real-time hedging, tick-level storage.

items.name: Cross-Currency Crypto Dynamics
items.desc: Cross-currency basis & liquidity fragmentation in crypto using high-frequency data — stablecoin pricing inefficiencies under the GENIUS Act.

items.name: Barrier Option Pricing
items.desc: Monte Carlo engine under risk-neutral GBM for path-dependent barrier options with sensitivity analysis.

items.name: NASDAQ Prediction System
items.desc: LSTM system for high-frequency NASDAQ prediction — +26.7% forecasting accuracy via hyperparameter optimization.

items.name: Risk Stress-Testing Dashboard
items.desc: Quant risk terminal — portfolio exposure, market stress simulation & downside risk with Monte Carlo scenarios.

items.name: Minted Wealth
items.desc: Financial intelligence dashboard — live market data, portfolio analytics & net-worth insights.

items.name: Numerix Women in Finance Scholarship
items.desc: 2025 recipient of the prestigious Numerix Women in Finance Scholarship.

items.name: Cloud Generator — CG0R
items.desc: 1st Prize, Engineering Clinics Expo — autonomous floating buoy system for oil spill cleanup and cloud formation acceleration.

items.name: Humanoid Robot
items.desc: 1st Prize, Engineering Clinics Expo — biped robot powered by Alexa with custom skills, built on Raspberry Pi and Arduino.

items.name: Geometry of Intelligence
items.desc: Series decoding the math powering machine learning and deep learning.

items.name: A Better Way to Resample Macroeconomic Time Series
items.desc: A time-aware, decay-weighted forward-fill method for macro series.

items.name: Building Animated Globe Visualizations
items.desc: How I built the rotating globe visualization, step by step.

items.name: Breaking Down the 32nd Bond Price Format
items.desc: Demystifying the complexities of the 32nd bond price format.

items.name: Unlocking the Power of Obsidian Vaults with Python
items.desc: A simple guide to supercharge your note-taking.
